name: Zuppa Inglese
recipeIngredient: 1 Pane di Spagna - baked and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Bake pane di spagna until thoroughly cooked.
3. Allow the bread to cool completely at room temperature.
4. Once cooled, cut into cubes or slices as desired.
5. Use the prepared bread in your zuppa inglesa recipe following standard instructions.
